title: SoulBind+
description: SoulBind+ is a Minecraft survival plugin that links all players lives. If one player dies, everyone online dies too in a dramatic, sound based server wipe. Lightweight, optimized , and compatible with 1.16 to 1.21.11+
body:
# SoulBind User Guide

![SoulBind](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd8f92ee15177d864818894cd11c4f889f98ca38.png)

# SoulBind v2.1.9 - All Features

## Core Mechanics
- Global death synchronization - when one player dies, all players die
- 3-second dramatic death sequence with cinematic sounds
- Triggering player excluded from global death (won't die twice)
- Works on Minecraft 1.16 → 1.21.11

## Protection System
- Command-based player protection (`/soul protect <player>`)
- Permission-based bypass (`soulbind.bypass`)
- Runtime protection toggle (`/soul protection on/off`)
- Protected player list management
- Protected count display in death broadcast
- Hide protection messages option

## Commands
- `/soul` or `/soulbind` or `/sb` - Show plugin info
- `/soul reload` - Reload configuration
- `/soul protect <player>` - Add player to protection list
- `/soul unprotect <player>` - Remove player from protection list
- `/soul protection <on|off>` - Toggle protection system
- `/soul protection message <hide|show>` - Hide/show protection count messages

## Permissions (LuckPerms Compatible)
- `soulbind.admin` - Full access to all features
- `soulbind.reload` - Reload config only
- `soulbind.protect` - Manage protection system
- `soulbind.bypass` - Death immunity
- `soulbind.notify` - Receive admin notifications
- `soulbind.*` - Wildcard all permissions

## Config Options
- `global-death.enabled` - Enable/disable plugin
- `global-death.kill-delay` - Death delay in ticks
- `global-death.sounds-enabled` - Toggle sound effects
- Custom sound sequence (4 sounds configurable)
- `protection.enabled` - Default protection state
- `protection.hide-messages` - Default message hide state
- `message-display.show-triggered-by` - Show triggering player
- `message-display.show-protection-count` - Show protected count
- `message-display.send-protection-notification` - Notify protected players
- Full message customization (15+ messages)
- Color code support (&0-&f, &l, &o, &m, &r)

## Technical
- No dependencies required
- LuckPerms optional integration
- UUID-based player tracking
- Offline mode compatible
- Async-safe task scheduling
- Sound fallback for missing sounds
- Hot reload support (no restart needed)
- 14 KB JAR size
- Negligible TPS impact
